title: Binary Prefix Divisible By 5
titleCn: 可被 5 整除的二进制前缀

testcases.input: nums = [0,1,1] Output: [true,false,false] Explanation: The input numbers in binary are 0, 01, 011; which are 0, 1, and 3 in base-10. Only the first number is divisible by 5, so answer[0] is true.
testcases.expectedOutput: [true,false,false] Explanation: The input numbers in binary are 0, 01, 011; which are 0, 1, and 3 in base-10. Only the first number is divisible by 5, so answer[0] is true.
